title: sabulina gracilipes
intro: Sabulina gracilipes, also known as the dwarf sandwort or sandwort, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sabulina gracilipes include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by steeping the plant in a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
